source: local Domain Intelligence Engine only (pattern matched: Record-Lifecycle Workflow)

domainAwarePages.pagePurpose: Primary workspace for managing Human Resources end to end - covers the full Record-Lifecycle Workflow lifecycle.
validations: required fields must be present before submission
status transitions must follow Draft -> Submitted -> Approved/Rejected -> Archived
only the owner or an admin may edit a record while in Draft
a rejected record requires a reason before the owner can resubmit
navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view
domainAwarePages.emptyState: No HumanResources records yet - show a "Create HumanResources" call to action.
domainAwarePages.loadingState: Skeleton rows while HumanResources list is fetched.
domainAwarePages.errorState: Inline error banner with retry if HumanResources list/detail fails to load.
permissionRules: Owner can view/act according to the Record-Lifecycle Workflow role matrix - see requirement-scope.json for per-step authorization.
Reviewer can view/act according to the Record-Lifecycle Workflow role matrix - see requirement-scope.json for per-step authorization.
Admin can view/act according to the Record-Lifecycle Workflow role matrix - see requirement-scope.json for per-step authorization.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Create HumanResources Record (Human Resources)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Owner can perform "Create HumanResources Record" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Edit HumanResources Record (Human Resources)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Owner can perform "Edit HumanResources Record" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Owner can perform "Submit HumanResources for Review" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Reviewer can perform "Review HumanResources Record" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Reviewer can perform "Reject HumanResources Record" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Archive HumanResources Record" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Audit Trail Capture (Human Resources)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Audit Trail Capture" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Notify Stakeholders (Human Resources)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Notify Stakeholders" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Generate HumanResources Report (Human Resources)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Generate HumanResources Report" only when business rules and validations for HumanResources are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

note: 10 domain-aware requirements/pages below define actual Human Resources business behavior (Record-Lifecycle Workflow pattern) - the generic page list above only covers page-level CRUD scaffolding from the platform's own requirements. Implement both sets.
